name: gt13_leadnl_run
drl:
rule "RJ"
no-loop
salience 5
when
    not LK2(f1 != true)
    $p : P($x : f0, f1 == 0)
then
    $p.setF1(1);
    update($p);
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, true));
end
rule "RO1"
salience 7
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
end
rule "RO2"
salience 7
when
    LK2($v : f0)
    $p : P($x : f0)
then
end
